title: boltonia asteroides
intro: Boltonia asteroides, also known as false aster, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of essential oils, flavonoids, and saponins. The health benefits of Boltonia asteroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin conditions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, coughs, and skin irritations. Boltonia asteroides can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
